name: silence-holds
prompt: Extreme close-up on feminine lips parting, almost speaking. Words not coming. The dangerous silence. Soft focus face behind, glasses visible. Pink flush at edges of frame. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading

name: healing-finishes
prompt: Medium shot two women in infirmary. Brown-haired woman with glasses and cardigan LEFT releasing silver-haired woman's wrist RIGHT. Contact just broken, hands separating. Brown-haired healer stepping back, silver-haired patient steady now. Clinical white room, medical bed visible behind them. Post-healing moment. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading

name: shared-knowledge
prompt: Two-shot both women standing apart now. Silver-haired woman LEFT, composure forced. Brown-haired woman with fogged glasses CENTER-RIGHT, still flushed, stepped back. Medical bed visible between them. Neither acknowledging what passed. Loaded silence visible in their postures. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading

name: nina-appears
prompt: Medium shot young woman in doorway BACK of frame. Nurse uniform white dress slightly too small, straining at chest. Platinum asymmetrical bob. Pale blue hazy eyes. Flushed and breathless, satisfied expression. Leaning against door frame. Night shift arriving. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading

dialogue.speaker: Nina
dialogue.text: Shift handoff. How's our S-Class patient?

bubble: Speech from Nina in doorway BACK of frame, place bubble TOP-CENTER with tail pointing down toward her in doorway

name: ninas-knowing-look
prompt: Close-up on young woman with platinum bob. Pale blue eyes scanning, reading the tension in the room. Lazy smile forming. She knows something happened here. Flushed complexion, satisfied expression deepening with interest. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading
